proposalKinds.description: Proposal centered on state Bitcoin or digital-asset reserve policy.
Proposal centered on Bitcoin-linked or Bitcoin-backed bond policy.
Proposal that materially combines reserve and bond policy in one record.

proposalSubtypes.description: A strategic reserve or treasury-holding proposal focused on Bitcoin or explicit digital-asset reserve exposure.
A bond proposal where proceeds materially finance reserve acquisition or reserve-related treasury policy.
A bond whose economics or terms are materially linked to Bitcoin exposure.
A bond collateralized or secured by Bitcoin holdings or equivalent Bitcoin-linked collateral.
A reserve proposal that includes Bitcoin within a broader digital-asset reserve concept.
An edge case that remains publishable only with an explicit editorial explanation of classification.
